title: Create Power+
description: Adds electricity, flying vehicles, and better terrain generation to Create & Minecraft!
body:
## About Create Power+
Create Power+ is basicly a lightweight version of the Friendgroup create server modpack that is focused more on the power generation aspect of create. There is also a more realistic aproach using ir suff like positive and negitive wires to connect various machines. The more simplified way uses FE or forged energy which involves only one wire to connect from point A to B.

## why you might be intersted in this modpack
If you are reading this, you prop realy like building electrical grids in mc or something like that i guess.
